choices.text: Gnosis Safe multi-sig as owner + TimelockController for critical changes. Multi-sig prevents single-key rug; timelock gives users exit window before malicious change. Standard for production protocols (Uniswap, Aave, Compound).

Phishing: user signs tx to attacker contract → attacker calls victim's tx.origin-gated function → tx.origin = user (still owner). msg.sender would be attacker, blocking. Always use msg.sender for auth.
